auth.loggedout: You have been logged out successfully.
auth.thankyou: Thank you for visiting. We hope to see you again soon!

logout.description: Thank you for using our service.

error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again later.
error.notAuthenticated: User authentication information is missing. Please log in again.

wallet.metamask_not_installed: MetaMask is not installed. Please install MetaMask extension.
wallet.cannot_disconnect_only_method: Cannot disconnect. This is your only login method. Use the Logout button in the navigation bar to sign out.
wallet.confirm_disconnect: Are you sure you want to disconnect your MetaMask wallet?
wallet.disconnect_feature_coming_soon: Wallet disconnect feature will be implemented soon. For now, please use the account unlinking feature in the Account Linking section.
wallet.disconnect_error: Failed to disconnect wallet. Please try again.
wallet.signature_rejected: Signature request was rejected. Unlink cancelled.

intro.title: How to Join
intro.description: Follow these steps to register for the whitelist.

step2.title: Approve Signature Request
step2.description: Free, no gas fees. Only your wallet address is registered.

intro.notice: Signing is for identity verification only. No funds will be transferred.

connecting.title: Connecting MetaMask
connecting.description: Please connect your MetaMask wallet to continue.

signing.title: Waiting for Signature
signing.description: Please sign the message in MetaMask.

success.title: Successfully Joined!
success.description: You have successfully joined the Founders NFT whitelist.

alreadyJoined.title: Already Joined
alreadyJoined.description: This wallet address is already registered in the Founders NFT whitelist.

error.title: Error Occurred
error.description: An error occurred while processing your request.

alreadyWithdrawn.title: Already Withdrawn
alreadyWithdrawn.description: This wallet address has already been withdrawn from the whitelist.

login.title: Login to NASUN

login.ownershipVerification: • This is only to verify you own this wallet
login.officialSiteOnly: • Only sign on the official NASUN website

footer.ai: Please note: no AI was involved in the content of this website except for translating English. AI will be an integral component of Nasun, but we feel whoever comes here and reads our words should know that Nasun comes from our hearts. It is important for us that you feel our personal passion for this endeavor to create a vibrant community rooted in the principles of mutual creative, financial freedom and shared prosperity.
footer.copyright1: Nasun and any associated logos are registered trademarks.
footer.title: Nasun
